title: campanula fragilis f. hirsuta
intro: Campanula fragilis f. hirsuta, a fragrant, hairy variant of the Campanula fragilis plant, is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family, Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a natural remedy for wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and promote tissue repair, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Campanula fragilis f. hirsuta can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, with the latter being the most commonly used herbal preparation to harness its medicinal properties.
